title: leersia oryzoides var. inclusa
intro: Leersia oryzoides var. inclusa, also known as swamp rice cutgrass, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the grass family and is native to North America. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Leersia oryzoides var. inclusa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
